objective: Lay groundwork for orchestration pause/resume by adding state machine and checkpoint primitives.

integration_points.summary: POST /api/execute sequentially executes clarify, planning, generate, repair with sessionId context.
Iterative repair loop already accepts sessionId; future checkpoints may wrap attempts.
Clarification detection will later map to AMBIGUITY interrupts feeding checkpoint payloads.

checkpoint_schema.payload_notes: pendingQuestions capture human-in-the-loop prompts; executor block holds generation progress.

risks: Need consistent resume behavior when loading checkpoints with mismatched versions.
Session ID sanitization must prevent path traversal when writing checkpoint files.
validation_plan: Unit tests for valid/invalid state transitions.
Checkpoint read/write round trips with schema validation.
Negative tests for malformed checkpoint payloads.
